---
title: "Volleyball"
listing:
  contents: posts/volleyball
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
page-layout: full
---

NCAA men's and women's volleyball analysis, sourced from boxscore data
via a daily automated pipeline into BigQuery. Pro volleyball (Major
League Volleyball, home of Indy Ignite) is planned once a suitable data
source is in place.
